eyebrow.zh: 本地运行，无账号，单二进制

headline.zh:
给 agent 加 MCP server
一条命令装进所有客户端
headline.en:
Give your agent an MCP server
installed everywhere, in one command

sub.zh: 探测你已装的客户端，写前备份，幂等合并，再逐一 stdio 握手验证。全程单进程，不上云。
sub.en: Detects the clients you already have, backs up before writing, merges idempotently, then handshake-verifies each over stdio. One process, no cloud.

title.zh: 一条命令，装进所有客户端

body.zh: 一次 mcpx add，自动探测本机已装的 Claude Code、Claude Desktop、Codex、Cursor，按各家 schema 一次性写好，不用为每个客户端手改一份不同的 JSON。
body.en: A single mcpx add auto-detects the Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Codex and Cursor installs on your machine and writes each one to its own schema at once. No more hand-editing a different JSON per client.

title.zh: 备份先行 · 幂等写入

body.zh: 落盘前先备份原配置，只合并你要装的那一条 server 条目，绝不碰你的其它键；原子写入。再跑一次是安全的空操作。
body.en: Backs up the original config before touching disk, merges only the one server entry you asked for, never touches your other keys, and writes atomically. Re-running is a safe no-op.

chips: › 只动一条 · 原子写入

body.zh: 写完不算完：mcpx 起子进程走 stdio JSON-RPC，跑一遍 initialize + tools/list，8 秒内确认每个客户端真的连得上、拿得到工具列表。
body.en: Writing isn't enough: mcpx spawns the server over stdio JSON-RPC, runs initialize + tools/list, and confirms within 8 seconds that each client really connects and returns its tool list.

title.zh: 本地 · 无账号 · 单二进制

body.zh: 没有常驻服务、没有云、不需要注册账号，也不引入 MCP SDK 依赖。一个跨平台静态二进制，装进 PATH 即用。
body.en: No daemon, no cloud, no account to create, and no MCP SDK dependency pulled in. One cross-platform static binary: drop it on your PATH and go.

headline.zh: 把 5-6 步 × N 客户端，收敛成一条命令
headline.en: Collapse 5-6 steps × N clients into one command

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、无付费墙。本地写配这一核心动作，永不设墙。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, no paywall. The core act of writing config locally is never gated.

tag.zh: 一条命令的跨客户端 MCP 本地安装器
